description_long: This is a tall, rectangular bookcase constructed from dark wood, featuring five evenly spaced horizontal shelves. The front face is open, allowing easy access to the shelves, while the sides and back are solid panels that provide structural support. The wood grain is visible, giving the surface a natural, matte finish. The shelves are deep and wide, suitable for storing books, decorative items, or office supplies. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and no visible hardware or ornamentation. Its substantial size and sturdy build make it ideal for placement in offices, libraries, or urban residential interiors.
description: A tall, dark wood bookcase with five open shelves and a minimalist, functional design. The surface is matte with visible wood grain and solid side and back panels.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the solid, flat panel of the bookcase with no visible shelves.
description_view_1: The front view reveals five open shelves framed by solid sides and a back panel, displaying the full storage capacity.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, identical to view 0, shows the solid, flat panel with no shelf visibility.
description_view_3: The back view displays a solid, unbroken panel with no openings or shelves visible.
